confirmatory_analysis: partition_sensitivity_summary.csv compares half-chain and checkerboard policies

panel_descriptions: Left: distribution of ridge normal-equation residuals across condition numbers and seeds.
Right: distribution of parity inequality margins Delta_par - Delta_naive; negative indicates theorem consistency.
key_takeaways: Residuals remain numerically near machine precision under lambda>0.
Parity-shrink inequality shows no violations under sampled policy envelopes.
/app/outputs/runs/b200d34b-0546-4360-9be.uncertainty_notes: Histograms pool seed-level stress tests; tails indicate numerical conditioning sensitivity.

panel_descriptions: Left: parity and naive deltas by dataset with 95% confidence intervals.
Right: robustness score per dataset with A_adv acceptance coloring.

variables.delta_naive: quantum-classical delta with fixed classical policy

key_takeaways: Hard-dataset deltas exceed stage-gate threshold in this run.
A_adv uses frozen tuple delta_min=0.015, p_max=0.01, r_min=0.65.
/app/outputs/runs/b200d34b-0546-4360-9be.uncertainty_notes: Error bars are 95% t-based confidence intervals over five seeds with BH-corrected p-values.

panel_descriptions: Top-left: heatmap of mean utility g_t(J).
Top-right: mean accuracy gain versus J across hard datasets.
Bottom-right: boundary derivative distributions for theorem preconditions.
key_takeaways: Interior optima appear for multiple (dataset, t) slices.
High-coupling saturation/reversal regions are explicitly visible.
/app/outputs/runs/b200d34b-0546-4360-9be.uncertainty_notes: Seed-averaged surfaces; derivative-support fractions recorded in dg_dJ boundary table and sensitivity table.

panel_descriptions: Left: operator share R_op with bootstrap confidence intervals.
Right: shrinkage Delta_naive - Delta_par with 95% confidence intervals.

variables.R_op: operator variance share after clipping negative components

key_takeaways: Operator share lower bounds exceed 0.5 on at least one hard benchmark.
Parity matching reduces naive quantum-classical deltas.
/app/outputs/runs/b200d34b-0546-4360-9be.uncertainty_notes: R_op intervals are nonparametric bootstrap CIs; shrinkage uses t-based CIs across seeds/cells.

hm_cf_parity_conditioned_advantage.why: A_adv satisfied on at least one hard dataset under frozen thresholds; parity audits pass.

hm_cf_entanglement_geometry_causality.why: Interior-optimum conditions hold in a substantial subset of slices; sensitivity branch indicates regime dependence.

hm_cf_operator_causal_share.why: R_op bootstrap lower bound exceeds 0.5 for hard cases and shrinkage remains positive.
